# GridSense AI

> AI-powered residential energy monitoring for Rwandan households. Tracks electricity use and live cost across Rwanda's tiered RURA tariff (89 / 310 / 369 RWF/kWh), warns before a household crosses into a more expensive tier, and gives personalized money-saving recommendations. Available in English and Kinyarwanda.

GridSense AI is an African Leadership University (ALU, Kigali) capstone project. The Phase-1 demo uses a whole-home current-transformer (CT) sensor with an ESP32 over Wi-Fi, plus optional energy-metering smart plugs. In this demo the sensor data is simulated and clearly labelled; the tariff math and appliance load model are sourced and real.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Live home energy demo — real-time power, month-to-date cost, tier-cliff alerts, monthly forecast, appliance breakdown, and savings advice (English & Kinyarwanda).
